The board card is in `App.tsx`, with most of the behavior controlled by `.ticket-card`, `.card-excerpt`, `.labels`, and `.drag-handle` rules in `styles.css`. I’m reading those exact sections now so the patch stays narrow.

  "name": "relay",

The expansion is CSS-driven: excerpts increase from 2 to 4 lines on hover/focus, labels and the drag handle are hidden until hover/focus/selection, and the card itself lifts with gradient and shadow. I’m going to make those expanded elements permanent, replace card state effects with border color changes only, and keep the drag transform used by the DnD library scoped to actual dragging.

The first patch removes the hover-driven expansion and the extra drag scaling. I’m doing a quick pass for leftover card hover/focus rules now, because this kind of change usually fails on one remaining selector rather than on the main block.

One remaining pointer-dependent rule was only restoring opacity on hover after keyboard selection; I removed that too so moving across non-selected cards does not brighten/dim them. Next I’m running the project checks.

`npm test` passed, and typecheck completed cleanly. I’m running the build as a final renderer sanity check, then I’ll inspect the focused diff and report only the changes I made in the already-dirty worktree.

 M src/renderer/src/styles.css
The build passed as well. The remaining `--relay-shadow-*` matches are shared tokens or non-card surfaces; the card selectors themselves no longer use those shadows or hover expansion rules.

**Summary**
Made board cards static and border-only: excerpts now render at the expanded 4-line presentation by default, labels and drag handles are always visible, card hover/focus no longer changes height, transform, max-height, shadows, gradients, or revealed content. Keyboard focus/selected/dragging states now use border color only. Removed the extra drag rotate/scale while keeping DnD transform movement.

**Files Changed**
- [App.tsx](/Users/robertpitt/Projects/relay/src/renderer/src/App.tsx)
- [styles.css](/Users/robertpitt/Projects/relay/src/renderer/src/styles.css)

**Commands Run**
- Attempted `rg`; unavailable in this shell, so used `grep`, `find`, `sed`, `cat package.json`, `git status --short`, and `git diff` for inspection.
- `npm run typecheck`
- `npm test`
- `npm run build`

**Tests**
- `npm run typecheck`: passed.
- `npm test`: passed, 36/36 tests.
- `npm run build`: passed.

**Remaining Risks / Follow-up**
- I did not perform an interactive Electron hover/scroll pass in the running app from this tool session. Static inspection and build/tests confirm the card hover expansion/shadow rules are removed.
- The worktree already had unrelated changes before this ticket; I only touched the card drag transform and card presentation CSS.

payload.finalResponse:
**Summary**
Made board cards static and border-only: excerpts now render at the expanded 4-line presentation by default, labels and drag handles are always visible, card hover/focus no longer changes height, transform, max-height, shadows, gradients, or revealed content. Keyboard focus/selected/dragging states now use border color only. Removed the extra drag rotate/scale while keeping DnD transform movement.

**Files Changed**
- [App.tsx](/Users/robertpitt/Projects/relay/src/renderer/src/App.tsx)
- [styles.css](/Users/robertpitt/Projects/relay/src/renderer/src/styles.css)

**Commands Run**
- Attempted `rg`; unavailable in this shell, so used `grep`, `find`, `sed`, `cat package.json`, `git status --short`, and `git diff` for inspection.
- `npm run typecheck`
- `npm test`
- `npm run build`

**Tests**
- `npm run typecheck`: passed.
- `npm test`: passed, 36/36 tests.
- `npm run build`: passed.

**Remaining Risks / Follow-up**
- I did not perform an interactive Electron hover/scroll pass in the running app from this tool session. Static inspection and build/tests confirm the card hover expansion/shadow rules are removed.
- The worktree already had unrelated changes before this ticket; I only touched the card drag transform and card presentation CSS.
